source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my younger brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Mr. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: zoi6 saa1 taan1
cards.english: [At the beach]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: tung4 uk1 kei5 jan4 heoi3 saa1 taan1 waan2
cards.english: Peppa and her family are going to the beach

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 heoi3 saa1 taan1 waan2
cards.english: Peppa and George love going to the beach

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 hou2 do1 je5 aa3
cards.english: There are so many things

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 我哋走嗰陣，一定要小心，唔好漏低啲嘢
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zau2 go2 zan6 jat1 ding6 jiu3 siu2 sam1 m4 hou2 lau6 dai1 di1 je5
cards.english: When we leave, we have to be careful not to leave anything behind.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 太陽遮、沙灘袋、毛巾 鏟同水桶，仲有個沙灘波
cards.jyutping: taai3 joeng4 ze1 saa1 taan1 doi6 mou4 gan1 caan2 tung4 seoi2 tung2 zung6 jau5 go3 saa1 taan1 bo1
cards.english: Parasol, beach bags, towels, spades and buckets, and a beach ball.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 好，喺你哋去玩之前，首先要搽太陽油吖
cards.jyutping: hou2 hai2 nei5 dei6 heoi3 waan2 zi1 cin4 sau2 sin1 jiu3 caa4 taai3 joeng4 jau4 aa1
cards.english: Okay, before you guys go play, first we need to apply sunscreen.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 太陽非常曬 所以Peppa同George要搽太陽油
cards.jyutping: taai3 joeng4 fei1 soeng4 saai3 so2 ji5 tung4 jiu3 caa4 taai3 joeng4 jau4
cards.english: The sun is very strong, so Peppa and George need to apply sunscreen.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 不如試下呢個沙灘波先吖
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 si3 haa6 ni1 go3 saa1 taan1 bo1 sin1 aa1
cards.english: How about we try this beach ball first?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 mou5 man6 tai4 wo3
cards.english: Looks like there's no problem.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ni1 go3 saa1 taan1 bo1 mou5 man6 tai4
cards.english: This beach ball is fine.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: George，你拋個波畀我接住佢吖
cards.jyutping: nei5 paau1 go3 bo1 bei2 ngo5 zip3 zyu6 keoi5 aa1
cards.english: George, throw the ball to me so I can catch it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: zip3 zyu6
cards.english: George, catch it!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 弊喇，George佢太細個，接唔到個波啊
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 keoi5 taai3 sai3 go3 zip3 m4 dou3 go3 bo1 aa3
cards.english: Oh no, George is too small, he can't catch the ball.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: m4 gan2 jiu3 gaa4
cards.english: It's okay, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 你同Peppa想唔想落水玩下啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 tung4 soeng2 m4 soeng2 lok6 seoi2 waan2 haa6 aa3
cards.english: Do you and Peppa want to go in the water to play?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 m4 goi1 de1 dei6
cards.english: Yes, please Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 噉你哋要帶咗水袖先喇
cards.jyutping: gam2 nei5 dei6 jiu3 daai3 zo2 seoi2 zau6 sin1 laa3
cards.english: Then you two have to put on your armbands first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 搞掂嘞，你帶咗水袖之後個樣好醒目啊
cards.jyutping: gaau2 dim6 laak3 nei5 daai3 zo2 seoi2 zau6 zi1 hau6 go3 joeng6 hou2 sing2 muk6 aa3
cards.english: All done, you look very smart with your armbands on.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: dou3 ngo5 laa3
cards.english: My turn...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 好，而家我哋可以落水玩喇
cards.jyutping: hou2 ji4 gaa1 ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 lok6 seoi2 waan2 laa3
cards.english: Okay, now we can go in the water to play.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: di1 seoi2 dung3 m4 dung3 aa3
cards.english: Is the water cold?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: di1 seoi2 jau6 nyun5 jau6 syu1 fuk6 aa3
cards.english: The water is warm and comfortable.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 put3 ngo5 laa1
cards.english: Don't splash me!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: hai6 nei5 hoi1 ci2 put3 sin1 ge2 de1 dei6
cards.english: You started splashing first, Daddy!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ngo5 dei6 put3 gau3 seoi2 laa3
cards.english: I think we've splashed enough water.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 爹哋，我好鍾意嚟沙灘啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 hou2 zung1 ji3 lai4 saa1 taan1 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, I really like coming to the beach!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 saa1 taan1
cards.english: Peppa and George really like the beach.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 saa1 taan1
cards.english: Everyone really likes the beach.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 你哋想唔想用鏟同水桶啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 soeng2 m4 soeng2 jung6 caan2 tung4 seoi2 tung2 aa3
cards.english: Would you two like to use the spade and bucket?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 m4 goi1 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Okay, thank you Mummy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 爹哋…我哋可以用沙埋住你嗎？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 jung6 saa1 maai4 zyu6 nei5 maa1
cards.english: Daddy...can we bury you in the sand?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1 aa1 de1 dei6
cards.english: Please, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: gam2 hou2 laa1
cards.english: Alright then.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: Peppa同George喺度用沙埋住豬先生
cards.jyutping: tung4 hai2 dou6 jung6 saa1 maai4 zyu6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: Peppa and George are burying Mr. Pig in the sand.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: zaang1 di1 zaa3
cards.english: Almost there.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: gaau2 dim6 laa3
cards.english: Finished!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 nei5 zau2 m4 lat1 laa3
cards.english: Now you can't escape.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gok3 dak1 go3 tau4 jau5 di1 jit6 aa3
cards.english: I think my head is a bit hot.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 bong1 ngo5 daai3 ding2 mou2 maa1
cards.english: Can you put a hat on me?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: gam2 nei5 gong2 m4 goi1 aa1
cards.english: Then say please.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1 nei5 bong1 ngo5 daai3 ding2 mou2 aa1
cards.english: Please help me put on the hat.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 hou2 laa1 de1 dei6
cards.english: Okay then, Daddy.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: m4 goi1 saai3
cards.english: Thank you.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 我諗我都係瞓返一陣先喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 ngo5 dou1 hai6 fan3 faan1 jat1 zan6 sin1 laa3
cards.english: I think I'll go back to sleep for a bit.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jat1 cai4 deoi1 sing4 bou2 aa1
cards.english: George, let's build a sandcastle together.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: tung4 zeon2 bei6 jung6 saa1 deoi1 sing4 bou2
cards.english: Peppa and George are going to build a sandcastle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 首先鏟啲沙入個桶度，好似噉
cards.jyutping: sau2 sin1 caan2 di1 saa1 jap6 go3 tung2 dou6 hou2 ci5 gam2
cards.english: First, shovel some sand into the bucket, like this.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 nei5 zau6 faan2 zyun3 go3 tung2
cards.english: Then you turn the bucket upside down.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: paak3 haa6 keoi5 gan1 zyu6 ling1 hei2 go3 tung2
cards.english: Pat it, then lift up the bucket.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: nei5 ling1 hei2 keoi5 laa1
cards.english: Lift it up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: jat1 zo6 saa1 sing4 bou2
cards.english: A sandcastle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ling1 hei2 keoi5 laa1
cards.english: Lift it up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: jau6 jat1 zo6 saa1 sing4 bou2
cards.english: Another sandcastle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 返屋企喇，記得唔好拎漏嘢喎
cards.jyutping: faan1 uk1 kei2 laa3 gei3 dak1 m4 hou2 ling1 lau6 je5 wo3
cards.english: Let's go home. Remember not to leave anything behind.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 我哋檢查有冇帶漏嘢先嗄
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 gim2 caa4 jau5 mou5 daai3 lau6 je5 sin1 aa2
cards.english: Let's check if we've left anything behind first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 毛巾、沙灘袋 太陽遮仲有個沙灘波
cards.jyutping: mou4 gan1 saa1 taan1 doi6 taai3 joeng4 ze1 zung6 jau5 go3 saa1 taan1 bo1
cards.english: Towels, beach bag, parasol, and a beach ball.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: ji5 ging1 ling1 cai4 saai3 laa3
cards.english: We've already got everything.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 我總係覺得我哋漏咗啲嘢噉
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zung2 hai6 gok3 dak1 ngo5 dei6 lau6 zo2 di1 je5 gam2
cards.english: I still feel like we've forgotten something.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 係喇，我哋唔記得拎頂帽啊
cards.jyutping: hai6 laa3 ngo5 dei6 m4 gei3 dak1 ling1 ding2 mou2 aa3
cards.english: That's right, we forgot to take the hat.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 爹哋，我哋唔記得咗爹哋啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 dei6 m4 gei3 dak1 zo2 de1 dei6 aa3
cards.english: Dad, we forgot Dad!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 係啊，我哋唔記得咗爹哋啊
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 ngo5 dei6 m4 gei3 dak1 zo2 de1 dei6 aa3
cards.english: Yeah, we forgot Dad!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: haa5 me1 aa3
cards.english: Huh? What?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.characters: 爹哋，我哋爭啲漏咗你啊
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 dei6 zaang1 di1 lau6 zo2 nei5 aa3
cards.english: Dad, we almost left you behind!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 zung6 gei3 dak1 nei5
cards.english: But George still remembers you

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E46 At the Beach［在沙灘］
cards.jyutping: hou2 coi2 nei5 zung6 gei3 dak1 ngo5 zek1
cards.english: Thank goodness you still remembered me, George!
